landing.headline: Find Government Schemes You
landing.subtext: No long forms. No confusion. Just tell us about yourself in simple language, and let our AI assistant do the rest.
landing.heroChat1: Hi! How can I help you find a scheme today?
landing.heroChat2: I'm a student from Bihar looking for scholarships.
landing.heroChat3: I found the Bihar Post Matric Scholarship! Would you like more details?
landing.featuresSubtext: Simplifying the complex world of Indian government benefits.
landing.feature1Desc: Our smart assistant analyzes your profile to find exactly which schemes you qualify for in seconds.
landing.feature2Desc: No complex jargon. Talk to us in English, Hindi, or Hinglish just like you're chatting with a friend.
landing.feature3Desc: We guide you through the entire process, explaining required documents and application steps clearly.
landing.feature4Desc: We only provide information and links from official .gov.in websites to ensure your safety.
landing.howItWorksSubtext: Get matched with your benefits in three easy steps.
landing.step1Desc: Answer a few simple questions about your income, state, and occupation.
landing.step2Desc: Get a curated list of government schemes designed specifically for your profile.
landing.step3Desc: Learn how to apply and track your application progress in one single dashboard.
landing.footerDesc: Your AI-powered companion for navigating Indian government schemes and benefits.
landing.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: This is an independent assistant tool. It is NOT an official government website and we do not represent any government entity. We provide information based on publicly available government data.

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Enter your email to continue.

tracker.title: My Applications
tracker.empty: You have no tracked applications yet.

scam.title: Scam Protection Checker
scam.subtext: Verify if a scheme website is officially recognized by the government.

helpers.title: Local Helpers
helpers.subtext: Find nearby centers or agents to help you apply for schemes.

formHelp.title: Sahayak AI
formHelp.subtext: Ask questions while filling out official forms
formHelp.welcome: Hello! I am your Sahayak AI. Keep me open in a side window while you fill out your application on the official portal. What term or step do you need help with?

chat.yourSchemes: Here are schemes you may qualify for:
chat.noSchemes: No schemes found for your profile. Try changing your answers.
